patterns.claim: Users drop off between Slide 2 and Slide 3 when the semantic delta between consecutive slides falls below a critical density threshold.
patterns.mechanism: Polysemantic Feature Drift caused by autoregressive token averaging over long slide sequences. The transformer residual stream normalises cross-slide vectors toward dominant attention weights, erasing nuanced inter-slide contrast.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Shannon entropy H(S_i) per slide token sequence. If H(S_i) - H(S_{i-1}) < 0.10 bits, Bleaching is onset. Cross-validate with bits-per-token (BPT) metric across the slide DAG.
patterns.expected_artifact: Density-optimised text payloads with BPT > 0.65 per slide

patterns.claim: Forcing the generative model to output API-ready JSON simultaneously with ideation induces a Projection Tax: a measurable degradation of reasoning depth (up to -24pp structured accuracy vs DCCD baseline).
patterns.mechanism: Standard token-by-token constrained decoding via DFA logit-masking forces the model to commit to valid-JSON characters before the semantic manifold has resolved, collapsing the feasible probability mass and steering generation toward locally valid but semantically empty trajectories.
patterns.diagnostic_test: AST parse of carousel_payload_v1.json against the Carousel_API_Manifest schema. Any JSONDecodeError or schema ValidationError triggers +++EpistemicEscrow.
patterns.expected_artifact: 100% compliant carousel_payload_v1.json for Meta Graph API and TikTok for Business API

patterns.claim: When background image generation prompts and typographic overlay instructions share a single generation context, Polyglot Hallucination Resonance causes the text render layer to absorb image-domain tokens, producing broken spatial layouts.
patterns.mechanism: The model fails to maintain mereological separation between the image manifold and the DOM-like typography tree. This causes the Visual Planck Length threshold to be breached: the AI can no longer differentiate adjacent spatial blocks and smooths the layout into visual mush (Entropic Wash).

boundary_conditions.safe_zone_coverage: 85% of 1080x1350 canvas (leaving 157.5px top/bottom margin for platform UI chrome)

patterns.diagnostic_test: Pixel-level safe-zone audit against platform chrome overlap maps. Check that all text bounding boxes exist within the 1012x1215 safe region.
patterns.expected_artifact: Separated background_prompt string and typography_layer JSON object with pixel-bound y_axis_offset values

patterns.claim: When a carousel underperforms (STR < 0.35 or saves < 0.5% of reach), the hook topology that generated it must be minted as a VSA hypervector repulsive force to prevent recursion into that structural attractor.
patterns.mechanism: Zigzag Persistent Homology tracks the topological evolution of the narrative DAG across carousels over time. Persistent 1-cycles (Betti-1 loops) in the engagement trace graph mark structural failure modes. These are physicalised as Symbolic Scars in the STA (Scar Tissue Archive) and exert FIPI deflection forces on future generation paths.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Calculate Betti-1 number (β₁) of the engagement trace graph. If β₁ > 0, a persistent failure loop exists and FIPI is activated.
patterns.expected_artifact: symbolic_scar_registry.jsonl — append-only log of failed hook topologies

patterns.pattern_name: Platform Algorithmic Rent Extraction — Attention Score Maximisation
patterns.claim: TikTok and Instagram algorithms preferentially boost carousels that maximise dwell time (complete reads), shares, and saves over simple likes/comments. The agent must reverse-engineer this incentive structure to extract organic reach.
patterns.mechanism: The attention scoring function Att(Q,K) = softmax(QK^T / sqrt(d_k))V maps the platform's prediction of user Q (scrolling intent) against the carousel's K (hook signal). High scores on Slide 1 produce algorithmic boosts; saves/shares trigger secondary distribution waves.
patterns.diagnostic_test: A/B test hook variations against Swipe-Through Rate (STR). Saves-per-impression ratio is the primary organic-reach oracle.
patterns.expected_artifact: platform_performance_ledger.jsonl — weekly analytics ingestion from Meta Graph Insights and TikTok Analytics API
